title: uragoga leucocarpa
intro: Uragoga leucocarpa is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the red-barked uragoga. Traditionally, the plant is used to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Uragoga leucocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Uragoga leucocarpa can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
